A

Apple - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin.food
Standard food: grows the snake by one segment when eaten.
Apple(Point) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.food.Apple
Creates an apple at the given position.
applyEffect(Game) - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.food.Apple
 
applyEffect(Game) - Method in interface ru.nsu.kiryushin.Food
Applies the food's effect to the game model.
applyEffect(Game) - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.food.Booster
 
applyEffect(Game) - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.food.Chili
 
applyEffect(Game) - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.food.Ice
 

B

Booster - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin.food
Speed-increasing food: accelerates the snake by ~33% when eaten.
Booster(Point) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.food.Booster
Creates a booster at the given position.

C

Chili - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin.food
Shrinking food: removes the last body segment of the snake when eaten.
Chili(Point) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.food.Chili
Creates a chili pepper at the given position.
CONST_SPEED - Static variable in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Game
Nanoseconds per tick at 1× speed; divide by the multiplier to get the actual interval.
createRandom(Point) - Static method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.FoodRegistry
Creates a random food item at the given position, respecting each type's SpawnWeight.
createSpecific(Class<? extends Food>, Point) - Static method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.FoodRegistry
Creates an instance of a specific food type at the given position.

D

Direction - Enum Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin
Cardinal directions for snake movement.
DOWN - Enum constant in enum class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Direction
Downward movement (increasing Y).

E

equals(Object) - Method in record class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Point
Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.

F

Food - Interface in ru.nsu.kiryushin
A food item that can be placed on the board and applies an effect when eaten.
FoodRegistry - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin
Discovers all concrete Food implementations at runtime and creates instances by weighted random selection.
FoodRegistry() - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.FoodRegistry
 

G

Game - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin
Core game model: holds the snake, food map, and win/lose logic.
Game(int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Game
Creates a game with the given board dimensions and win condition.
GameController - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin
JavaFX controller: drives the game loop, renders the board, and routes keyboard/Arduino input.
GameController() - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.GameController
 
GameState - Enum Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin
Possible states of a running game session.
getAllFoodTypes() - Static method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.FoodRegistry
Returns an unmodifiable view of all discovered concrete food types.
getBody() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Snake
Returns a read-only view of the body ordered head-to-tail.
getColumns() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Game
Returns the board width in tiles.
getDirection() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Snake
Returns the current movement direction.
getFoodsOnBoard() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Game
Returns a read-only view of the current food items on the board, keyed by position.
getHead() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Snake
Returns the head position.
getLength() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Snake
Returns the number of body segments.
getPosition() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.food.Apple
 
getPosition() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.food.Booster
 
getPosition() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.food.Chili
 
getPosition() - Method in interface ru.nsu.kiryushin.Food
Returns the board position of this food item.
getPosition() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.food.Ice
 
getRows() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Game
Returns the board height in tiles.
getSnake() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Game
Returns the snake.
getSpeed() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Game
Returns the timer interval in nanoseconds between game ticks.
getSpeedMultiplier() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Game
Returns the current speed multiplier (1.0 = normal, >1 = faster, <1 = slower).
getState() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Game
Returns the current game state.
grow() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Snake
Schedules the snake to grow by one segment on the next Snake.move() call.

H

handleInput(Direction) - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.GameController
Routes a direction command to the snake.
hashCode() - Method in record class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Point
Returns a hash code value for this object.

I

Ice - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin.food
Speed-reducing food: slows the snake by ~33% when eaten.
Ice(Point) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.food.Ice
Creates an ice tile at the given position.
initialize() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.GameController
FXML lifecycle hook: loads food and snake textures, then starts the first game.

L

LEFT - Enum constant in enum class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Direction
Leftward movement (decreasing X).
LOSE - Enum constant in enum class ru.nsu.kiryushin.GameState
Snake collided with a wall or itself.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Main
Launches the JavaFX application.
Main - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin
JavaFX entry point: loads the FXML scene, detects Arduino, and lets the user choose the input method.
Main() - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Main
 
move() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Snake
Advances the snake one cell in the current direction.

P

PLAYING - Enum constant in enum class ru.nsu.kiryushin.GameState
Game is active and accepting input.
Point - Record Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin
Immutable grid coordinate.
Point(int, int) - Constructor for record class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Point
Creates an instance of a Point record class.

Q

queueDirection(Direction) - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Game
Queues a direction change.

R

restartGame() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.GameController
FXML button handler: hides the game-over overlay and starts a fresh game.
RIGHT - Enum constant in enum class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Direction
Rightward movement (increasing X).
ru.nsu.kiryushin - package ru.nsu.kiryushin
 
ru.nsu.kiryushin.food - package ru.nsu.kiryushin.food
 

S

setDirection(Direction) - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Snake
Changes the movement direction, ignoring reversal into the opposite direction.
setSpeed(double) - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Game
Multiplies the current speed by the given coefficient, clamped to [0.5, 3.0].
shrink() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Snake
Removes the tail segment immediately; does nothing when the snake is only one cell long.
Snake - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin
Snake entity: body segments, movement, and growth logic.
Snake(Point) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Snake
Creates a snake with a single segment at the given start position, facing right.
SpawnWeight - Annotation Interface in ru.nsu.kiryushin
Annotation that sets the weighted spawn probability for a Food subclass.
start(Stage) - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Main
 

T

toString() - Method in record class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Point
Returns a string representation of this record class.

U

UP - Enum constant in enum class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Direction
Upward movement (decreasing Y).
update() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Game
Advances one game tick: moves the snake, checks collisions, and checks the win condition.

V

value() - Element in annotation interface ru.nsu.kiryushin.SpawnWeight
Relative spawn weight; defaults to 10.
valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Direction
Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class ru.nsu.kiryushin.GameState
Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
values() - Static method in enum class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Direction
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
values() - Static method in enum class ru.nsu.kiryushin.GameState
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

W

WON - Enum constant in enum class ru.nsu.kiryushin.GameState
Win condition reached.

X

x() - Method in record class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Point
Returns the value of the x record component.

Y

y() - Method in record class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Point
Returns the value of the y record component.
